channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ravens and Bills lost plenty of talent last offseason, but stayed in Super Bowl contention
item.description: OWINGS MILLS, Md. (AP) — Stefon Diggs, Gabe Davis, Patrick Queen and Jadeveon Clowney. Those are just a few of the key players Buffalo and Baltimore lost last offseason, when free agency and salary cap constraints threatened to knock both teams down a notch.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jets interview Vikings' Flores and McCown and Packers' Hafley for their head coaching job
item.description: The New York Jets interviewed Minnesota Vikings defensive coordinator Brian Flores and quarterbacks coach Josh McCown and Green Bay Packers defensive coordinator Jeff Hafley on Friday for their head coach vacancy.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: As college sports move toward pay for play, Title IX looms as another hurdle for the NCAA
item.description: A court settlement that would require colleges – for the first time – to pay athletes billions for their play is not going to settle the debate over amateurism in NCAA sports.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sixers center Joel Embiid to miss upcoming road trip with swelling in his left knee
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid again has swelling in his left knee and will miss the Philadelphia 76ers’ upcoming road trip, the latest injury setback for the All-Star center who has played in only 13 games this season. Embiid had been sidelined for the last six games with a sprained left foot.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dawn Staley's $25M extension is richest salary in women's college hoops history, South Carolina says
item.description: Coach Dawn Staley has received a contract extension that South Carolina said will make her the highest paid college women’s basketball coach of all time at a total value of about $25 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: American tennis star Taylor Fritz pledges to donate Australian Open prize money to LA wildfires relief fund
item.description: American tennis star Taylor Fritz said that he is donating his Australian Open prize money to the relief funds for the wildfires in the greater Los Angeles area.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CFP championship by the numbers: Ohio State could give Big Ten 1st back-to-back titles since 1942
item.description: The Big Ten could puff out its chest over having two of its teams in the College Football Playoff semifinals, and the conference will have another point of pride if Ohio State beats Notre Dame for the championship Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travel demands of 12-team College Football Playoff add momentum to ticket prices for title game
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Notre Dame and Ohio State fans have had to endure unprecedented travel demands throughout college football’s first 12-team playoff to reach Monday night’s national championship game.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Done partying in St. Anton, new US ski standout Macuga seeks a 2nd World Cup victory in Cortina
item.description: CORTINA D'AMPEZZO, Italy (AP) — The party at St. Anton’s Krazy Kanguruh après-ski bar lasted into the early hours of Monday morning when the U.S. Ski Team’s newest standout celebrated her first World Cup victory last weekend. “I think we were home by 2.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Erling Haaland signs lucrative new contract with Man City until 2034
item.description: Erling Haaland has signed a new contract at Manchester City through 2034, committing his long-term future to the Premier League champions with one of the most lucrative deals in soccer amid uncertain times for the club on and off the field.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State's Will Howard vows to continue to 'trust in the Lord' even in the midst of life's highs and lows
item.description: The Ohio State quarterback shared a six-word message, which included the Bible verse "Psalms 118:24," on his Instagram account ahead of the national title game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jackson Mahomes, brother of Chiefs star, posts farewell TikTok video to followers
item.description: Jackson Mahomes, the brother of Kansas City Chiefs superstar quarterback Patrick Mahomes, put out a farewell video to his TikTok followers on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah HC's youngest player having big impact
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Logan Cooley may only be 20 years old, but it is scary to think where the Utah Hockey Club would be without him this year. Cooley can't even drink legally, and he is second on the team in points with 12 goals and 25 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: South Side native Katie Schumacher-Cawley coaches PSU to national v-ball title while undergoing cancer treatment
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky./CHICAGO (AP, WGN) — Katie Schumacher-Cawley, a native of the Mount Greenwood neighborhood on Chicago's South Side, is an NCAA national champion — for a second time. But there's so much inspiration to her story beyond just winning on the court.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Texans’ practice update: Azeez Al-Shaair, Juice Scruggs, Shaq Mason return to practice, Joe Mixon added to injury report
item.description: Texans get back several key players at practice Wednesday, including team captain and starting linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: Murphy and Williamson carry the Pelicans to a 119-113 win over the Bulls
item.description: Trey Murphy III scored 32 points and Zion Williamson added 21 as the New Orleans Pelicans beat the Chicago Bulls 119-113 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sammy Sosa to attend 2025 Cubs Convention, team announces
item.description: Former Chicago Cub and fan favorite Sammy Sosa will attend the 2025 Cubs Convention, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Cubs not among Roki Sasaki's final 3 teams
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs were among the teams told they were out as the free agency frenzy for Japanese phenom pitcher Roki Sasaki has been narrowed to three clubs, according to a new report.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Verlander uses supermodel wife's name on Giants introductory Zoom call, causing awkward moment
item.description: (KRON) -- Justin Verlander uses his wife's account for Zoom calls, and a member of the San Francisco media got a kick out of it. His account name caused a funny moment during his introductory press conference on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Cubs sign former Brewers starting pitcher to one-year deal
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have signed former Milwaukee Brewers starting pitcher Colin Rea to a new contract for the 2025 MLB season, while the Cubs have designated RHP Michael Arias for assignment to make room for Rea on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Collier takes a tumble, then hits game-winning shot
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Rookie Isaiah Collier drove for the go-ahead layup with 2 seconds left to lift the Utah Jazz to a 112-111 overtime victory over the Brooklyn Nets on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Oregon Ducks 2024 receiver arrested as fugitive
item.description: Ryan Tristan Chance Taylor -- who played under the name Ryan Pellum -- allegedly used a 9mm pistol to assault someone on December 25 in Long Beach, California.
item.dc:creator: Tim Steele, NewsNation

item.title: New England hires former Patriots Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as coach
item.description: The team announced the hiring Sunday morning, a week after Patriots owner Robert Kraft fired Jerod Mayo following the team’s season-ending victory over the Buffalo Bills. Mayo finished 4-13 in his lone season.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State beats Boise State on 4-point play, 81-79
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #25 Utah State men’s basketball remained perfect in league play in dramatic fashion, defeating Boise State 81-79 in the Dee Glen Smith Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU loses third straight, falling at TCU, 71-67
item.description: FORT WORTH, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team has hit a funk at the beginning of the Big 12 Conference season. In a back-and-forth battle in Fort Worth, the Cougars fell 71-67 to TCU for its third straight loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LA Rams head for Arizona and a crucial playoff game with their minds on their fire-ravaged hometown
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams wrapped up practice at their training complex Friday under blue skies with bruise-colored clouds of wildfire smoke lurking on the horizon.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
